name: Edible Garden AG Inc
summary: PART I Overview Edible Garden is a controlled environment agriculture ("CEA") farming company. We use traditional agricultural growing techniques together with technology to grow fresh, organic food sustainably and safely while improving traceability. We operate glass, hydroponic, and vertical greenhouse structures that enable us to grow organic herbs consistently year-round while using less land, less energy, and less water than conventional agriculture.
